pr.title: Non Record: 0.1582 BPB — Learned Mixer Head + No TTT + Matrix LR 0.03

output.summary: Higher MATRIX_LR plus a learned mixer head with a frozen n-gram oracle removes TTT while keeping neural gating for per-token expert mixing.
techniques: Learned mixer head mixes neural model with frozen n-gram experts per token
Higher MATRIX_LR=0.03 trains the gate without TTT
Score-first backward-looking n-gram cache for eval mixing
